name: framework
description: OneLiteFeather's developer framework: bundles standardized tools for how the team builds software — a knowledge graph in Outline's "Vault" collection, a curated set of default Claude Code skills (superpowers, skill-creator, CLAUDE.md management, code review/simplification, security guidance, frontend design, docs lookup, iterative loops), and guided /framework:setup and /framework:doctor commands to onboard and verify the whole bundle.
